analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒緊繃，受美伊衝突和石油價格上漲影響，S&P 500收盤下跌0%。微軟平台推動亞太區AI現代化，IREN 美元 2.8 億美元 AI 雲端合約改變了 IREN 的投資理念。Netflix 因過去一年大幅下跌，最新財報出爐後再度跌落。戴蒙 Chase CEO 表示市場低估風險，目前不會買入股票或國債。克拉默認為應該超越科技業，因為人工智慧的不確定性搖擺市場。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜，避免被市場情緒左右。現在是風險評估和調整投資組合的好時機。投資者應該考慮多元化投資組合，減少對任何單一股票或行業的依賴。同時，投資者也應該密切關注市場發展和經濟情況，隨時準備調整投資策略。

【精選個股】
NVDA - NVIDIA - NVIDIA 股價下跌 16%，但仍然是人工智慧領域的領導者。風險提醒：人工智慧領域的不確定性可能會導致股價波動。
MSFT - 微軟 - 微軟平台推動亞太區AI現代化，提供了投資機會。風險提醒：微軟的競爭對手可能會挑戰其市場領導地位。
C - Citigroup - Citigroup 的財務表現良好，投資者可以考慮買入。風險提醒：銀行業的風險可能會導致股價波動。

items.title: Netflix Has Plummeted Over the Past Year and Just Dropped Again on Earnings. At 22 Times Profits, Is It a Buy?
items.summary: The quarter itself was solid. So why does the stock keep falling?
items.zh_title: Netflix 因過去一年大幅下跌，最新財報出爐後再度跌落。22 倍利潤是否值得買入？
items.zh_point: Netflix 的股價在過去一年大幅下跌，最新財報出爐後再度跌落。雖然季度財報表現良好，但股價仍持續下跌。分析師們認為 Netflix 的股價是否值得買入，尤其是考慮到其 22 倍利潤的高估值。

items.title: Does US$2.8 Billion in AI Cloud Deals with Tech Giants Change The Bull Case For IREN (IREN)?
items.summary: In July 2026, IREN Limited announced it had secured US$2.80 billion in new multi-year AI cloud services contracts with customers including Microsoft, NVIDIA, and several AI developers, lifting its 2026 AI Cloud annualized run-rate revenue target to more than US$4.00 billion, about 85% of which is now under contract. A key feature of these agreements is sizable customer prepayments covering roughly 45% of related GPU capital expenditure, which, together with IREN’s US$7.60 billion cash...
items.zh_title: IREN 美元 2.8 億美元 AI 雲端合約改變了 IREN 的投資理念？
items.zh_point: IREN 公布與微軟、NVIDIA 等科技巨頭簽下 2.8 億美元 AI 雲端服務合約，提高 2026 年 AI 雲端年度化收入目標至 4 億美元，約 85% 的收入已經簽下合約。這些合約的關鍵特點是客戶提前支付了大量費用，覆蓋了約 45% 的相關 GPU 資本支出，與 IREN 的 76 億美元現金儲備一起，為公司未來發展提供了穩固的基礎。

items.title: Amazon may be losing its biggest competitive edge
items.summary: As a longtime Amazon Prime member, I've come to expect my orders to arrive fairly quickly. Sometimes, though, Amazon exceeds my expectations. Not long ago, I placed an order for some first-aid supplies, expecting them to show up the next day. Roughly two hours later, my dogs started barking ...
items.zh_title: 亞馬遜可能正在失去最大的競爭優勢
items.zh_point: 亞馬遜的快速配送服務可能已經不是其競爭優勢的關鍵所在。

items.title: Microsoft Platforms Drive AI Modernization in Asia Pacific
items.summary: SYDNEY, July 21, 2026--Companies in Asia Pacific are incorporating Microsoft cloud and AI platforms into operating environments for compliance and competitiveness, ISG says.
items.zh_title: 微軟平台推動亞太區AI現代化
items.zh_point: 微軟雲端和人工智慧平台正被亞太地區公司納入營運環境，以符合法規要求和提高競爭力。

items.title: Review & Preview: Rough Start
items.summary: REVIEW PREVIEW NEWSLETTER Losing Streak. Markets started off the week on slippery footing as fighting over the weekend between the U.S. and Iran pushed oil prices higher. The S&P 500 ended the day down 0.
items.zh_title: 週初惡鬥開局
items.zh_point: 美伊衝突導致石油價格上升，S&P 500收盤下跌0%，市場在週初出現波動。

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: A turn higher in oil prices kept stocks under pressure on Monday. The Dow Industrials slid more than 300 points as Apple shares lost 2%.
items.zh_title: 星期二的大股市故事：什麼會影響明天的市場走勢
items.zh_point: 石油價格上漲使股市在星期一維持壓力，道瓊工業指數下跌逾300點，蘋果股價下跌2%。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
items.summary: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.
items.zh_title: 戴蒙警告市場低估風險，認為現價不買股票或國債
items.zh_point: 戴蒙 Chase CEO 表示市場低估風險，目前不會買入股票或國債，與投資者近期對戰爭、關稅等震撼事件的忽略形成對比。

items.title: Jim Cramer says it's time to look beyond tech as AI uncertainty rattles the market
items.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer says the AI trade has become too unpredictable, making this a better time to put new money into high-quality companies outside of technology.
items.zh_title: 克拉默認為應該超越科技業，因為人工智慧的不確定性搖擺市場
items.zh_point: 克拉默認為人工智慧的不確定性已經使得投資人難以預測，因此是時候將新資金投資在非科技業的優質公司上。

items.title: Trump imposing 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods over alleged trade discrimination
items.summary: Canada's relationship with the U.S. has frayed amid Trump's tariff-heavy agenda and vocal displeasure with the nations' trilateral trade pact with Mexico.
items.zh_title: 特朗普對某些加拿大商品徵收 50%關稅
items.zh_point: 特朗普政府因為貿易歧視問題，對某些加拿大商品徵收 50% 關稅，進一步惡化美加關係。這一決定與美國對墨西哥的三邊貿易協議有關，美國總統特朗普對此表示不滿。

items.title: Trump says Netanyahu won't be arrested in New York, pushing back on Mamdani
items.summary: Israel's prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, is the target of an arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Court related to the war on Gaza.
items.zh_title: 特朗普稱紐約不會逮捕內塔尼亞胡，反駁馬曼迪尼
items.zh_point: 特朗普表示，美國紐約不會逮捕以色列總理內塔尼亞胡，內塔尼亞胡因涉及加沙戰爭而被國際刑事法院發布逮捕令。

items.title: U.S. hits Canada with stiff new tariffs, escalating trade tensions
items.summary: The Trump administration on Monday said it would slap 50% tariffs on some goods imported from Canada, in an effort to end what it sees as discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against the U.S. automobile, dairy and alcohol industries.
items.zh_title: 美國對加拿大祭出嚴厲新關稅，升級貿易緊張局勢
items.zh_point: 美國政府宣布對來自加拿大的部分商品徵收 50% 高關稅，試圖結束對美國汽車、乳品和酒精行業的歧視性貿易行為。

items.title: I racked up $35,000 in credit-card debt. Should I file for bankruptcy?
items.summary: “I’m also considering working with a credit-counseling agency or enrolling in a hardship program.”
items.zh_title: 我欠了 35,000 美元的信用卡債務，該不該申請破產？
items.zh_point: 一位年輕人因信用卡債務累積達 35,000 美元，正在考慮申請破產或與信用評估機構合作，尋求解決方案。

items.title: Why are gasoline prices rising faster than oil prices? Blame it on the ‘crack.’
items.summary: The spread between the cost of barrels of gasoline and crude oil — known as the “crack spread” — has widened sharply.
items.zh_title: 為什麼汽油價格上漲速度快於原油價格？ blame it on the ‘crack.’
items.zh_point: 汽油價格與原油價格之間的差距——稱為「crack spread」——已經大幅擴張。

items.title: I will claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?
items.summary: “The strongest argument for claiming benefits earlier goes beyond the traditional break-even analyses.”
items.zh_title: 我會提早領取社會保障金。為什麼這麼少人提到這個問題？
items.zh_point: 提早領取社會保障金的理由，遠遠超出傳統的成本效益分析。

items.title: Why cheap Chinese AI models could actually be a boon for Nvidia, Micron and other chip stocks
items.summary: Moonshot AI’s Kimi K3 could encourage a surge in enterprise workloads and provide a long-term tailwind to chip demand.
items.zh_title: 為什麼廉價的中國人工智慧模型可能對Nvidia、Micron等晶片股帶來好處
items.zh_point: 廉價的中國人工智慧模型可能會刺激企業負載的增長，從而為晶片需求帶來長期的尾風。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌　中國DeepSeek事件引發整體AI路線的大規模崩盤
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商遭遇大幅下跌，多家公司股價下跌超過10%，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 倫敦金銀市場結算下跌
items.zh_point: 倫敦金價跌幅達1.4%，連續兩天下跌；銀價跌幅達2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中華深尋AI：你需要知道什麼
items.zh_point: 中華深尋AI宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，成本低廉，並不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋求不會讓美國AI巨頭沉淪
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭股價大幅下跌的恐慌情緒被認為是過度擴大。

items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊業公司在最新的市場話題中佔據了關注焦點。

items.title: Why is Nebius stock rising after-hours today?

items.zh_point: Nebius 股票在延長交易時間內出現上漲，原因尚未明確，但可能與公司的財務表現、業績預期或市場情緒等因素有關。

items.title: Chinese destroyer held live-fire drill in Japan’s EEZ, Japan says

items.zh_point: 日本政府指出，中國一艘驅逐艦在日本的經濟海域內進行實彈演習，引起日本政府關注，日本政府要求中國解釋此事。

items.title: Oil holds gains as traders weigh U.S.-Iran conflict, Houthi Saudi blockade
items.zh_title: 石油持續上漲，交易商考慮美伊衝突和胡塞派沙烏地封鎖
items.zh_point: 石油價格持續上漲，交易商正在衡量美伊關係緊張和胡塞派對沙烏地的封鎖對石油供應的影響。

items.title: South Korean economy likely slowed in Q2 after robust Q1 growth: Reuters poll
